summary: Comprehensive testing of Venue Reviews & Ratings system. All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: VenueDetail reviews section with summary/distribution/cards, Write Review form with star picker, VenueOwnerDashboard Reviews tab with stats.

integration_issues.flow: Write Review button appearance after booking
integration_issues.issue: After creating and confirming a booking in the same session, the Write Review button doesn't appear until page reload. The canReview check is only called on component mount, not after booking confirmation.

backend_tests: test_full_review_flow - PASS (create booking, confirm, submit review, verify duplicate rejected with 409)
frontend_tests: VenueDetail review-summary shows avg rating, star distribution bars, review count - PASS
VenueDetail reviews-list shows review cards with user name, stars, comment, date - PASS
VenueDetail no-reviews message when no reviews - PASS
VenueDetail write-review-btn appears when user has eligible bookings - PASS
VenueDetail review-form opens on button click - PASS
VenueDetail star-picker hover highlight and click select work - PASS
VenueDetail submit-review-btn submits and closes form - PASS
VenueDetail review appears in list after submission - PASS
VenueOwnerDashboard owner-reviews-tab shows stats (Avg Rating, Total, 5-Star) - PASS
VenueOwnerDashboard review cards show for selected venue - PASS
VenueOwnerDashboard no reviews message when venue has no reviews - PASS

action_items: OPTIONAL: Call loadReviews() after booking confirmation to refresh canReview status without page reload
critical_code_review_comments: Reviews API properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
Star distribution aggregation pipeline is correct and efficient
Duplicate review prevention works correctly (409 Conflict)
Venue rating/total_reviews auto-update after review submission works
One review per booking enforcement is properly implemented
Frontend star picker has proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created review during backend test_full_review_flow. SmashPoint Courts has 4 reviews, Kick Off Bengaluru has 1 review after frontend test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews system fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/venues/{id}/reviews (list), GET /api/venues/{id}/reviews/summary (aggregates), GET /api/venues/{id}/reviews/can-review (auth required), POST /api/venues/{id}/reviews (create). Frontend: VenueDetail has Reviews & Ratings section at bottom with summary/distribution/cards/write form. VenueOwnerDashboard has Reviews tab. SmashPoint Courts (7dffc3a2-f373-47bb-9989-7dcb421908cb) has 4 reviews for testing.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment gateway: MOCKED - Using mock-confirm endpoint for booking confirmation
